name: Maryland
agency: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation
address: 301 West Preston Street, 8th Floor, Baltimore, MD 21201

steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC per your operating agreement
Wind up business affairs and settle all debts and obligations
File final tax returns with Maryland Comptroller of the Treasury
File online via Maryland Business Express or by mail (no filing fee)
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and trade names
llc.notes: No filing fee for standard processing (6-8 weeks). Expedited processing costs $50 (7-10 business days). Online filing through Maryland Business Express includes a 3% service fee for electronic payments.

steps: Obtain board of directors resolution authorizing dissolution
Obtain shareholder approval of dissolution (two-thirds of votes entitled to be cast)
Wind up business affairs and settle all obligations
File final tax returns with Maryland Comptroller of the Treasury
File online via Maryland Business Express or by mail (no filing fee)
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and trade names
corporation.notes: No filing fee for standard processing. Expedited processing available for $50. Maryland uses SDAT (State Department of Assessments and Taxation) rather than a Secretary of State for business filings.

tax.notes: File final Maryland corporate income tax return (Form 500) and final personal property return with SDAT. Must obtain tax clearance from the Comptroller. File final sales tax and withholding returns if applicable. SDAT may require all annual reports and personal property returns to be current.

requirements.publicationDetails: Corporations must publish notice of dissolution in a newspaper of general circulation in the county of the principal office.
requirements.employeeNotification: Maryland Economic Stabilization Act requires 90 days notice for reductions of 25+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors in writing with deadline for submitting claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Resident agent must be maintained until dissolution is complete; all annual reports and personal property returns must be current
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Entity continues to exist for three years after dissolution for purpose of winding up
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Majority vote of members or per operating agreement. Corporation: Board resolution followed by two-thirds shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
